title: Lively Turtle Helmet
description: Turtle Helmet now has a life!
body:
### Angelos'
# Lively Turtle Helmet
The pack you didn't know you needed. This resource pack brings your Turtle Helmet to life by adding an adorable head and little legs, turning your helmet into a little turtle friend. ### Compatible with Joyful Motions
ㅤ
# Discord Server You can join our Discord server to report bugs, give suggestions and try early access!
**Angelos' Workshop** [ ](https://discord.gg/qMrDaZZCdG)
# Important This resource pack contains modified assets from [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX. Used under their terms. # Requirements This pack requires **Entity Model Features**
